speech_reference_light.description: Conservative cleanup for already usable voice references. Keeps timbre mostly intact.

speech_reference_crisp_noisy_mic.description: Default for muffled laptop/headset/interview mics. Reduces rumble/noise, adds presence, controls dynamics.

lecture_cleanup.description: For YouTube lectures or podcast audio with decent speech and room tone. Cleaner than aggressive denoising.

aggressive_noisy_mic.description: Fallback for very noisy or distant microphones. Use only if light/crisp presets remain unclear.
